final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing styled smartphone photo of Korean-cafe-style fashionable coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays in a Japanese diary note style — no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean cafe aesthetic shot in a casual smartphone photography style suitable for Instagram Stories — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the coffee and desserts as focal subjects with hand-drawn annotation lines, arrows, and dashed guides layered over the photo pointing to each element
Subject: must include coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets items typical of a Korean cafe setting (no people)
Scene/backdrop: needs a Korean cafe interior or flat-lay surface context — exact backdrop is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, fashionable, cozy cafe atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a light, airy, muted-pastel direction typical of Korean cafe aesthetics — exact tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs the annotation layer to feel like white-pen hand-drawn lines — slightly uneven, single-stroke, rough quality — exact line weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotation text (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) for each element following these rules:
  • 飲み物 → 味・温度・気持ち（例：「すっきり」「やさしい甘さ」）
  • 食べ物 → 食感・おいしさ（例：「しっとり」「さいこう」）
  • 空間 → 雰囲気（例：「ほっとする」「いい時間」）
  • 全体 → 一言まとめ（例：「しあわせすぎた〜」）
  Decoration: add subtle steam lines ☁, sparkles ✦, heart ♡, small emoji-like doodles — moderate, leaving breathing room / 余白
Constraints: must preserve hand-drawn outline traces around object silhouettes; annotations must feel like a personal diary / one-liner / emotional note; overall finish must feel Instagram-story × magazine rough-note style — fashionable yet casual
Avoid: overcrowded annotations; heavy or digital-looking text; people or human figures
